---
title: "Broken Quarto"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

```{r}
    library(palmerpenguins)
    head(penguins)
    library(ggplot2)
    library(dplyr)
```

```{r}
    penguins |>
      filter(species == "Adelie") |>
      ggplot(aes(x = bill_length_mm, y = bill_depth_mm)) +
      geom_point()
```
